name: Siren's Sway
description: This model gains the following trigger on all actions printed on its stat card:

granted_triggers.name: Lament of the Cursed
granted_triggers.text: This trigger must be declared, if able. Immediately, this action fails. This model declares an action chosen and controlled by the opposing player. This model may discard a card to discard this upgrade.
granted_triggers.applies_to: all actions printed on its stat card

extraction_notes: The trigger has the skull symbol indicating mandatory status
Timing keyword 'must be declared' indicates this is a when_declaring trigger
The mandatory nature is further reinforced by 'This trigger must be declared, if able' in the effect text
